ddls:
CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the committee operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the committee */,
  "chairperson_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee's chairperson */,
  "chairperson_email" TEXT /* Email address of the chairperson */,
  "chairperson_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the chairperson */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the committee */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the committee was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "date_of_checking" TEXT /* Date when the application status was checked */,
  "time_of_reporting" TEXT /* Time when the candidate is expected to report for further process */,
  "status_change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in application status */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "eligibility_requirements" TEXT /* Additional eligibility requirements for the category */,
  "percentage_reservation" REAL /* Percentage of reservation for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., candidate, evaluator, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user to access the system */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the candidate */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or comments from the evaluator */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the interviewer */,
  "interview_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interview in minutes */,
  "interview_format" TEXT /* Format of the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the candidate */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interview_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview schedule */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate scheduled for the interview */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the interviewer */,
  "interviewer_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the interviewer */,
  "is_rescheduled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interview has been rescheduled */,
  "rescheduled_date" TEXT /* New date if the interview has been rescheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interview_schedules_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who submitted the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the document has been verified */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the document */,
  "verified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eligibility_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligibility criterion */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category eligible for the position */,
  "minimum_marks" REAL /* Minimum marks required for the position */,
  "other_requirements" TEXT /* Other requirements for eligibility */,
  "age_limit" INTEGER /* Age limit for the position */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Minimum experience required for the position */,
  "educational_qualifications" TEXT /* Educational qualifications required for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eligibility_criteria_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eligibility_criteria_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the position is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range for the position */,
  "number_of_vacancies" INTEGER /* Number of vacancies available for the position */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for applying to the position */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Location where the job is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)
